[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000100000 2
1 0000010101 3
2 0110100001 4
3 1001101010 5
4 1000100001 3
5 1101010001 5
6 1010011101 6
7 1000100000 2

12 21 1000100000 2 match 0 7

56 65 0000000000 a
67 76 0000010000 1
70 07 1001010010 4
